name: American Express Membership Rewards Credit Card
exclusions: EMI conversion at point of sale
excluded spends as per American Express terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 bonus Membership Rewards points for using the card 4 times on transactions of Rs 1,500 and above every month
Additional 1,000 Membership Rewards points on spending Rs 20,000 or more in a calendar month, subject to enrollment
100% renewal fee waiver on previous-year spends of Rs 1,50,000 and above; 50% waiver on spends from Rs 90,000 to Rs 1,49,999
additionalBenefits: Welcome gift of 4,000 Membership Rewards points
1 Membership Rewards point for every Rs 50 spent except excluded categories
Redeem points through the 18 and 24 Karat Gold Collection
EMI conversion option at point of sale

salaried: Eligibility is subject to American Express approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to American Express approval criteria
